title: TUE Research Data Management Guidebook
abstract: Research Data Management (RDM) guidebook for TU/e researchers, covering best practices, tools, and resources for managing research data effectively throughout the research lifecycle.

title: Pro Git Book
abstract: The authoritative guide to Git, available for free online. Covers everything from basics to internals.

title: The Turing Way
abstract: A handbook for reproducible, ethical and collaborative data science.

title: Software Management Plans
abstract: A guide for writing a SMP for your grant application.

title: Fair Software Route
abstract: Step-by-step interactive guide to making your research software FAIR.
